mapper.select: SELECT u.userid AS userId, u.username AS userName, h.expire_date AS expireDate, h.notes FROM sf_users u LEFT JOIN sf_health_cert h ON u.userid = h.user_id ORDER BY u.username ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sf_health_cert (user_id, expire_date, notes) VALUES (#{userId}, #{expireDate}, #{notes}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE expire_date = VALUES(expire_date), notes = VALUES(notes)
